items.title: Ofgem transformed to strengthen protections for energy consumers
items.summary: Billpayers set to benefit from a stronger energy regulator to ensure they are treated fairly

items.title: Notice: CCUS East Coast Cluster: NPT Pathfinder selection process
items.summary: Apply to the NPT Pathfinder selection process for non-pipeline transport CCUS projects seeking ECC Teesside network connection by 2032.

items.title: Notice: Heat Pump Investment Accelerator Competition: round 2
items.summary: This competition provides grant funding for investments in the manufacture of heat pumps and strategically important heat pump components in the UK.

items.title: The era of clean energy security
items.summary: Energy Secretary, Ed Miliband's speech at the Good Growth Foundation’s National Growth Debate.

items.title: Oil and gas: offshore environmental legislation
items.summary: Environmental regulations and guidance on offshore oil and gas exploration and production offshore gas unloading and storage and offshore carbon dioxide storage activities

items.title: Apply for a licence to carry out sanctioned trade through OTSI
items.summary: Check if you need a licence from the Office for Trade Sanctions Implementation (OTSI), and apply online.

items.title: Notice: Transitional Energy Certificates
items.summary: The criteria for Transitional Energy Certificates (TECs).

items.title: Notice: Heat Pump Ready Programme Round 2: innovation funding competition
items.summary: Information on the Heat Pump Ready Programme Round 2 innovation funding competition.

items.title: Reformed National Pricing: reforms to siting and investment levers
items.summary: We're seeking views on proposed reforms to the electricity market and their implementation.

items.title: Policy paper: Reformed National Pricing (RNP): delivery plan
items.summary: The reforms and their delivery that make up the Reformed National Pricing (RNP) programme, which will replace the Review of Electricity Market Arrangements (REMA).

items.title: Electricity network infrastructure: consents, land access and rights
items.summary: We are seeking views on proposed changes to land rights and consents processes for electricity network infrastructure.

items.title: Travel to Switzerland for work
items.summary: Check if you need a visa or permit to work in Switzerland and how to get one if you do.

items.title: Policy paper: Interministerial Group for Trade Communiqué: 4 March 2026
items.summary: A note of the meeting held by the Interministerial Group for Trade.

items.title: Post Office GLO Scheme to close following successful delivery
items.summary: The Group Litigation Order (GLO) Compensation Scheme will close to new applications on 31 July 2026, with a view to the scheme concluding on 31 December 2026.

items.title: Accredited official statistics: Weekly road fuel prices
items.summary: Road fuel price statistics providing average UK retail 'pump' prices on a weekly basis.

items.title: Decisive action to break influence of gas on electricity prices
items.summary: Families across the country will be better protected from energy crises, as government moves to break link between gas and electricity prices.

items.title: Accredited official statistics: Energy consumption in the UK 2025
items.summary: Information for overall energy consumption in the UK with details of the industry, transport, domestic and services sectors.

items.title: Correspondence: Keep Britain Working review – updates
items.summary: Updates on the independent review of the role of employers in tackling health based economic inactivity and promoting healthy and inclusive workplaces.

items.title: Make Work Pay: improving access to flexible working
items.summary: We are seeking views on a new process for employers to follow when handling flexible working requests, as well as insights on flexible working practices more broadly.

items.title: Guidance: Growth Gateway: Investment opportunities in Kyrgyzstan – Kalesay, Kutessay II and North Aktash
items.summary: Three investment-ready critical-mineral projects in Kyrgyzstan, for beryllium, rare earth elements, and antimony, fluorite and gold, offer strong economic opportunities.

items.title: Guidance: Growth Gateway: UK–Cambodia infrastructure market playbook
items.summary: A playbook for UK engagement with Cambodia to mobilise finance, strengthen governance and accelerate sustainable infrastructure in industrial, transport and energy sectors.

items.title: Guidance: Growth Gateway: Cambodia–UK partnership for green and inclusive growth
items.summary: This document outlines Cambodia’s near-term green infrastructure pipeline, highlighting 15 priority opportunities with economic, employment and climate benefits.

items.title: Guidance: Growth Gateway: Just Energy Transition Partnership SMME investment briefing pack for USAID bidders
items.summary: Briefing pack outlining a scalable SMME investment model for South Africa’s Just Energy Transition, with pipeline evidence, main barriers and a fund design to crowd in capital.

items.title: Guidance: Growth Gateway: ASEAN Industrial Projects Based Initiative framework
items.summary: The ASEAN Industrial Projects Based Initiative (AIPBI) framework outlines a non-binding mechanism to accelerate industrial projects, across goods, talent, finance and policy.

items.title: Guidance: Growth Gateway: Growth-stage investing, investor perspective on investing in growth-stage companies
items.summary: An investor guide to African growth-stage investing that explains fundraising stages, equity versus debt, markets and valuation methods for practical decision-making.

items.title: Guidance: Growth Gateway: Green Services Deal Accelerator – Off-grid solar market knowledge product
items.summary: A sector report on off-grid solar in Sub-Saharan Africa, outlining the access gap, affordability barriers, and how PayGo and blended finance can unlock a $20 billion opportunity.

items.title: Guidance: Growth Gateway: Green Services Deal Accelerator, electric 2-wheeler market sector report
items.summary: A sector report quantifying Africa’s electric 2-wheeler opportunity to 2033, highlighting charging-led revenue and East Africa’s economic and policy context.

items.title: Transparency data: Export control licensing management information for Israel
items.summary: Export control licensing management information from 7 October 2023 onwards.

items.title: Transparency data: DBT: workforce management information February 2026
items.summary: Reports on departmental staff numbers and costs.

items.title: Notice: UK ETS Allocation Table for operators of installations
items.summary: This table contains a list of each installation’s free allocation for the 2021 to 2026 allocation period.

items.title: Oil and gas: environmental submissions and determinations
items.summary: Interested parties can review records of applications and statements submitted to OPRED as required by environmental regulations.

items.title: Official Statistics: Trade and investment core statistics book
items.summary: A monthly snapshot of the UK’s trade and investment position, summarising trade statistics produced by ONS, HMRC, DBT and others.

items.title: Guidance: UK Defence and Security Exports event and exhibition support
items.summary: Information on which domestic and international events we will be at during 2026 and 2027, and guidance on how we can support businesses to participate.

items.title: Official Statistics: UK trade in numbers
items.summary: A snapshot of the UK’s latest trade and investment position, summarising statistics produced by ONS, DBT, and UNCTAD.

items.title: Notice: Notice to exporters 2026/12: exports to sanctioned destinations
items.summary: The Export Control Joint Unit (ECJU) has changed the team responsible for trade sanctions licensing responsibilities.

items.title: Official Statistics: Social Housing Decarbonisation Fund: February 2026
items.summary: Data to monitor the installation of energy efficiency measures in domestic properties via the Social Housing Decarbonisation Fund (SHDF) scheme in England.

items.title: Official Statistics: Boiler Upgrade Scheme: March 2026
items.summary: Data monitoring the uptake of low carbon technologies on the Boiler Upgrade Scheme (BUS), including the installation of air source heat pumps, ground source heat pumps and biomass boilers.

items.title: Accredited official statistics: Solar PV deployment: March 2026
items.summary: Monthly deployment of solar photovoltaic capacity in the United Kingdom.

items.title: Official Statistics: Great British Insulation Scheme release: April 2026
items.summary: Data to monitor the installation of energy efficiency measures in domestic properties via the Great British Insulation Scheme (GBIS).

items.title: Accredited official statistics: Household Energy Efficiency Headline Release (monthly data)
items.summary: Headline Household Energy Efficiency statistics under the Energy Company Obligation (ECO) and the Green Deal Framework.
